ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2009 CONTINUED TO APR-06-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-09-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION FOR ORDER RELIEVING PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FROM SANCTION ORDER ISSUED ON 4/6/2009 IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA VISCIO, CSR# 12353. (212)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T-MAC TRANSPORT LLC MCMILLAN, CHARLES L $27,809.52 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,124.20 INTEREST, $838.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,272.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Doug Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
Exhibit 1 (attached to complaint) - Declaration of Ernest Knowles---ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 (attached to complaint) - Commercial Lease Agreement------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 (attached to complaint) - Personal Guaranty---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declaration in support of the Default Judgement, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): T-Mac Transport LLC and Charles L. McMillan as follows:
Principal $27,809.52
Prejudgment Interest $3,124.20
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $838.50, for a total of $34,272.22
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Continued To Jul-27-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
